test.name: A01 – Áruház oldal betöltődik és termékek megjelennek

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: A02 – Termék keresése szöveggel

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: A03 – Üres keresésre nincs találat visszajelzés

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: A04 – Kosárba gomb megnyomása megnyitja a modalt

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: TC05 – Modal tartalmazza a termék nevét

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: A09 – Ár szűrő alkalmazás szűri a termékeket

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Skip If
kw.msg: Kosár nem üres – TC11 előtt futtasd
kw.arg: Kosár nem üres – TC11 előtt futtasd
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test if the ``condition`` is True.
kw.status: Kosár nem üres – TC11 előtt futtasd

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: Kosár nem üres – TC11 előtt futtasd

test.name: K05 – Checkout gomb validálja az üres szállítási adatokat

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath://div[contains(@class,"modal")]//h3[contains(.,"Hibás adatok")]' not found.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath://div[contains(@class,"modal")]//h3[contains(.,"Hibás adatok")]' not found.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained '/fizetes' but it was 'http://localhost:5173/kosar'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained '/fizetes' but it was 'http://localhost:5173/kosar'.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Not Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: TC22 – Helyes irányítószám zöld pipát mutat

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.querySelector('.b-container button[type="submit"]').click() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
